lines.text: ...and if you use AI...well, AI can make a data-structure, but can it structure your life?
lines.speaker: none

lines.text: Hello class, my name is professor Brad Rivers and this semester I'll be teaching your CAPSTONE class.
lines.speaker: none

lines.text: which as you know, is an oppurtunity to combine your heads with a peer and output a unique showcase of your knowledge.

lines.text: So think about that while we go over the syllabus for 5 minutes, and how to kill Grok for 45 minutes.
